Monetary sanctions are awarded to moving defendants in the full amount requested, $1,260.00. Tenants are allowed to select no more than 35 RFAs to propound collectively against the Tipton defendants. The court adopts in full the reasoning of the judge pro tem in his report dated August 3, 2017. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes.) Order is signed after the hearing. Judge: Charlene P.
